response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the Japanese and English 'GETCHA!' lyrics provided in the reference JSON. 2. The reference JSON contains a partial lyric set for the full duration; I have transcribed the opening verse and first chorus which are present in this segment. 3. Timing is strictly tied to Mori Calliope's vocal delivery, ensuring no early cutoffs and proper gaps during the instrumental intro and transitions.

subtitles.original: 愛の反戦一人じゃんけん
運命と縛り見ない振り
subtitles.english: Pretending not to see fate and restrictions

subtitles.original: Now I know all about you, babe
subtitles.english: Now I know all about you, babe

subtitles.original: I don't want the handbags, the money, or the diamond rings
subtitles.english: I don't want the handbags, the money, or the diamond rings

subtitles.original: 'Cause guys like you they all don't care about the little things
subtitles.english: 'Cause guys like you they all don't care about the little things

subtitles.original: まぁ anyway 吹っ切れた訳で
subtitles.english: Well, anyway, I think I got over this

subtitles.original: 棒に当たって吠えたって圏外です
subtitles.english: Barking after hitting a dead end is out of the question

subtitles.original: I'm moving on and I'm never ever turning back around, around, around again
subtitles.english: I'm moving on and I'm never ever turning back around, around, around again

subtitles.original: Now I'll go higher and I'll go higher
subtitles.english: Now I'll go higher and I'll go higher

subtitles.original: And you couldn't take me down if you tried
subtitles.english: And you couldn't take me down if you tried

subtitles.original: ばら撒いてた愛取返し撤退だ
subtitles.english: Taking back the love I showered over you and retreating

subtitles.original: Now I can finally open my eyes
subtitles.english: Now I can finally open my eyes

subtitles.original: そんで来世もっかい君への返品サイン
subtitles.english: And then, a return sign for you in my next life
Getcha out of my life, boy
